text: IITJMU/Acad/2026/PhD/FN/01 10 May, 2026 Notification Sub: Admission to Ph.D. Programmes for Foreign Nationals This is for the information for all the Foreign National candidates that the online applications for admission in Doctor of Philosophy (Ph.D.) programme for foreign nationals are invited through Study in India (SII) https://www.studyinindia.gov.in/ . Or International applicants are required to submit a certificate from the Institute (from where qualifying degree is completed) mentioning the medium of Instructions/studies followed by the candidates for Degree requirements were English. Further, candidates will be evaluated based on relevant subject knowledge/ prior research experience/skills during the online interaction. b. Shortlisted candidates need to submit their research proposal and updated CV. ROUND 3: Interview and/or Examination (in person) a. Shortlisted candidates from Round 2 will be called for an interview (in person at IIT Jammu). ## Ph.D Programme

IIT Jammu started the Ph.D programme in July 2018. Ph.D is being offered by the following departments.

1. Bio Sciences and Bio Engineering
2. Chemical Engineering
3. Chemistry
4. Civil Engineering
5. Computer Science and Engineering
6. Electrical Engineering
7. Humanities and Social Sciences
8. Interdisciplinary Program
9. Materials Engineering
10. Mathematics
11. Mechanical Engineering
12. Physics

## Admission to Ph.D. Programmes (July Session) for Academic Year 2026-27 (IITJMU/Acad/2026/Ph.D/353)

Apply Online

1. For information regarding admission to Ph.D. Programmes (July Session) for Academic Year 2026-27 (IITJMU/Acad/2026/Ph.D/353), kindly refer Detailed advertisement
2. For admission to Ph.D programmes, candidates need to register and fill the application online only by accessing the website saral.iitjammu.ac.in/phdapplication

## Admission to Ph.D. Programmes for Foreign Nationals (IITJMU/Acad/2026/PhD/FN/01)

1. For information regarding admission to Ph.D. Programmes for Foreign Nationals, kindly refer Detailed advertisement
2. This is for the information for all the Foreign National candidates that the online applications for admission in Doctor of Philosophy (Ph.D.) programme for foreign nationals are invited through Study in India (SII) https://www.studyinindia.gov.in/
3. **The cutoff date for considering application received through SII Portal for July 2026 cycle shall be 14 May 2026**
